market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
articles.description: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

articles.title: Five times President Trump made a statement that moved bitcoin, and why it might happen again this week
articles.description: Trump’s social media posts and statements to news reporters have triggered 5% to 12% swings in the price of bitcoin, blurring the lines between policy and market manipulation.

articles.title: Bitcoin faces near-term pressure as liquidity tightens, Hilbert Group CIO says
articles.description: Russell Thompson warned of a sharp tightening in global liquidity that could weigh on risk assets and bitcoin in the near term, before expected U.S. policy action provides relief.

articles.title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
articles.description: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

articles.title: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription, put it is mainly cosmetic
articles.description: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year

articles.title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
articles.description: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.

articles.title: UK gas-investment firm weighs bitcoin mining, draws criticism
articles.description: Reabold Resources' gas field is so large it could theoretically mine 50,000 BTC, local media said. The firm said it will test bitcoin mining before pivoting to data centers.

articles.title: Blockchain sleuth accuses RaveDAO of knowing who manipulated the price of its token
articles.description: The on-chain sleuth cited "suspicious" exchange-linked activity as RAVE swung from $60 million in market capitalization to $6 billion and back.

articles.title: Bitcoin daily gains near 3% as stocks ignore US-Iran war threat, oil drops
articles.description: Bitcoin bulls avoided a correction as US markets opened, but analysis warned that Strategy was responsible for much of the latest BTC price strength.

articles.title: U.S. crypto adoption is rebounding, bitcoin still dominates, Deutsche Bank says
articles.description: Retail participation in the U.S. has bounced back to mid-2025 levels even as most consumers expect lower bitcoin prices ahead, the bank said.

articles.title: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
articles.description: Deezer says consumption of AI-generated music on the platform is still very low, between 1-3% of the total streams, and that 85% of these streams are detected as fraudulent and are demonetized.

articles.title: App host Vercel says it was hacked and customer data stolen
articles.description: Vercel blamed its breach on an earlier hack at Context AI, which allowed hackers to hijack a Vercel employee's account to steal customer data.

articles.title: Kelp DAO claims LayerZero’s 'default' settings are what actually caused the massive $290 million disaster
articles.description: The liquid restaking protocol said the compromised verifier was LayerZero's own infrastructure, and the setup it was faulted for running was LayerZero's onboarding default.

articles.title: Global stablecoin rulemaking slows, prompting BIS to urge cooperation to avoid fragmentation risks
articles.description: To mitigate risks like sudden withdrawals, policymakers are debating safeguards such as limiting interest payments and offering issuers access to central bank backstops.

articles.title: Tether backs UAE tokenization firm KAIO in $8M funding round to bring Emirati funds onchain
articles.description: The Abu Dhabi regulated firm build infrastruture to distribute insitutional funds on blockchain rails, lowering entry barrier for investors.

articles.title: Bitmine buys 101,627 ETH in largest purchase since December 2025
articles.description: Bitmine bought 101,627 Ether last week, lifting holdings to 4,976,485 ETH, or about 4.12% of supply, as the company moves closer to its 5% target.

articles.title: Japan to test government bonds as digital collateral on Canton
articles.description: The Japanese Securities Clearing Corporation will test using Japanese government bonds as digital collateral on the Canton network with Mizuho, Nomura and Digital Asset.

articles.title: Coinbase, Bybit said to be working together on tokenization, custody and distribution of U.S. stocks
articles.description: The talks do not involve any sort of stake acquisition or similar deal to enter the U.S., as was reported elsewhere last month.

articles.title: 西班牙加速布局！加泰隆尼亞攻 IC 設計、光子；加那利群島盼轉型「矽島」
articles.description: 隨著《歐洲晶片法 2.0》即將於 5 月 27 日公布，各國都針對這一法案提供相應計畫，西班牙加泰隆尼亞政府與 […]

articles.title: ZachXBT asks MemeCore to explain valuation and token supply
articles.description: ZachXBT challenged MemeCore to justify its valuation and explain what he claimed is insider-held supply, as the onchain sleuth widened a probe after the RAVE token’s collapse.
